review.review_text: I was told the truck drove like a dream, but it has a transmission issue, rust on the frame, and was previously a heavy-duty work vehicle, none of which was disclosed.
revealed_facts: Previously used as a fleet vehicle for a landscaping company; hauled heavy loads and trailers regularly for 3 years
6R80 transmission exhibits delayed engagement when shifting from Park to Drive, especially when cold; likely worn valve body seals
Rear frame crossmember shows surface rust and early corrosion pitting from road salt exposure; not structural yet but progressing

review.review_text: The car looks nice, but I later found a small dent and learned about a minor prior accident that wasn't mentioned.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent with minor paint crack on rear passenger door from shopping cart impact, partially hidden by door handle shadow in photos
Single Carfax flag for minor fender bender in 2021, repaired at non-certified body shop with aftermarket bumper cover

review.review_text: The odometer was rolled back and the car has major undisclosed issues with the transmission, engine, and frame. This was a dishonest transaction.
revealed_facts: Odometer was rolled back from 187,000 to 142,000 miles; prior auction records confirm actual mileage
8-speed automatic exhibits shudder between 35-50 mph indicating torque converter lockup clutch failure; repair typically $2,800-$3,500
Active Fuel Management lifters ticking on cold start with intermittent misfire codes on cylinders 1 and 7; lifter/cam replacement needed
Rear frame crossmember shows significant corrosion with 30% material loss; will fail inspection in rust-belt states

review.review_text: I was told the car was meticulously maintained and drove like a dream, but it has a shuddering transmission and oil consumption issues, and was a rental car. I wish these facts had been shared.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
